full_description: Pick up the can, inspect the pure color label on its back side, and sort it by label color.
schema: {A} denotes the can with a backside color label, {B} and {C} denote the two candidate color areas, {a} denotes the arm used
preference: Mention inspecting the backside color label and placing the can in the area with the matching color. Do not reveal the actual label color in the instruction.
seen: Use {a} to pick up {A}, inspect the pure color label on its back side, and sort it into {B} or {C}.
Check the color label on the back of {A}; place it in the matching area among {B} and {C}.
Lift {A}, look at the backside color patch, and put the can in the matching color area.
Inspect the back-side color label on {A} and classify the can by label color.
unseen: Sort the can by reading the color of its backside label.
Place the can in the matching color area after checking the back label.
Use the color patch on the can back to decide between {B} and {C}.
lift the can for backside color inspection

seen: inspect the backside color label on {A}
unseen: check the color patch on the can back side

seen: restore {A} to the carried pose after inspection
unseen: return the can from the inspection pose

seen: place the can in the area whose color matches its backside label
unseen: sort the can into the matching color area
